rationale.risk-routing: Learned policy tiers actions: silent, flagged, or live check-in
rationale.hitl-workflow: Hard constraints, approval gates, revocable bounded delegation at CLI layer
rationale.oversight-explanation: Check-ins carry explanations; legible initiator-separated session summaries
rationale.framework: Reusable oversight architecture externalizing policy from model reasoning
rationale.built-system: Working Python CLI prototype with source code released
rationale.survey-input: 21-engineer survey on oversight preferences and agent concerns
